name: Klipy
notes: API for GIFs, stickers, clips, and AI content; HQ at 505 Montgomery St, San Francisco. City/state/industry were pre-filled and confirmed.

name: Servicecu
notes: Service Credit Union — largest credit union in New England, HQ at 3003 Lafayette Road, Portsmouth, NH 03801.

name: Flaunt
notes: Enterprise loyalty cloud for Shopify/Roblox, launched out of High Alpha in Indianapolis. Clients include PepsiCo, Lamborghini, Paris Hilton.

name: Usebump
notes: Bump by Ownors — creator financial tools/micro-advances platform, founded in Los Angeles. Raised $3M seed in 2024.

name: Geostar
notes: YC-backed (YC + PearX S25) GEO/AI search visibility platform helping companies drive inbound from ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. Based in New York.

name: Neuroagetx
notes: NeuroAge Therapeutics — longevity biotech focused on rejuvenating brain health and treating neurodegenerative diseases using ML. HQ at 135 Mississippi St, San Francisco.

name: Optierra
notes: Site describes itself as 'the intelligence layer for physical retail' but does not list HQ city/state/country. No crunchbase, LinkedIn, or other directory entries found to confirm location. Industry classified as Retail Tech (no standard vocabulary match).

name: Ilant Health
notes: Value-based obesity/cardiometabolic care startup. Multiple sources confirm New York, NY HQ; PitchBook shows Albany but majority sources and press releases confirm NYC. Raised $15M Series A in June 2026.

name: Patron
notes: Early-stage VC firm investing in web3, gaming, and consumer startups. Primary HQ is Santa Monica, CA; also has offices in SF and NYC. Founded 2021, raised $100M Fund II.

name: Ventanagrowth
notes: Ventana Capital Partners — early-growth equity firm focused on vertical AI and software. Website confirmed SF headquarters. Note: separate entity from Ventana Growth Funds (Irvine, CA) which is an older fund.

name: Overtonvc
notes: Overton Venture Capital — early-stage VC investing in technology and consumer sectors. HQ at 201 E. 79th Street, New York, NY 10075. Founded 2018.

name: Hale
notes: Personalized grooming product recommendations for men. Chicago/IL and Marketplace industry were pre-filled in input and confirmed by website content.
